features.name: Harness reliability pass
features.description: Make the coding-agent harness restartable by adding root state files, a startup script, current source-of-truth routing, and updated Vite/React production docs.
definition_of_done: Root AGENTS.md documents startup workflow, verification commands, scope rules, and Definition of Done.
Root feature_list.json, progress.md, session-handoff.md, and init.sh exist.
docs/SESSION_HANDOFF.md, docs/PRODUCTION_HARNESS.md, and docs/ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA.md reflect the v0.48/Vite state.
harness-creator validation reaches at least 70/100.
npm run harness:gate passes.
evidence: 2026-05-20: harness-creator validation passed at 100/100 across instructions, state, verification, scope, and lifecycle.
2026-05-20: ./init.sh passed; it ran npm run harness:gate with 40 test files / 291 tests, data validation, and production build passing.
features.next_step: Use the updated root harness files for future sessions, then start v0.49-alpha-event-reactions when product work resumes.

features.name: Office event reaction animation pass
features.description: Use the v0.48 sprite-sheet animation path to make card use, product launches, and rival/staff incidents produce short readable office reactions.
definition_of_done: At least one card-use or launch moment creates a visible office reaction.
Reaction data is driven by JSON or stable typed constants with a clear expansion path.
office-visuals QA scenario exposes the reaction state.
Relevant tests and npm run harness:gate pass.
Changelog, acceptance criteria, production report, and QA report are updated.

features.name: Alpha candidate consolidation
features.description: Bundle UI stability, persona retest, and screenshot-readiness into a larger alpha candidate after event reactions land.
definition_of_done: 20-person persona QA is rerun against the current v0.5 candidate.
P0/P1 findings are fixed or explicitly waived.
The first screen communicates the fantasy and first action within 30 seconds.
npm run harness:gate passes and reports are updated.

features.name: Office event pose sheet expansion
features.description: Extend the high-density agent sprite-sheet contract so event reactions can change actor poses, not only show speech bubbles.
definition_of_done: Asset manifest defines cheer, alert, and card-use pose rows or a clear equivalent pose contract.
Office event reactions can select a matching actor pose without breaking idle/work animation.
office-visuals QA scenario exposes at least one card-use pose and one alert/cheer pose.
Reduced-motion still disables motion-heavy animation.
Relevant tests and npm run harness:gate pass.
Changelog, QA report, and handoff docs are updated.

features.name: Generated source sprite replacement
features.description: Replace code-generated event-pose drafts with source-normalized high-resolution pixel art sheets while preserving the v0.51 manifest contract and anchor checks.
definition_of_done: Replacement source sheet follows the v0.51 3-column, 25-row event-pose contract or a documented normalized equivalent.
Frame anchors, feet placement, and silhouette drift are inspected through office-visuals and sprite-sheet preview frames.
Card-use and alert poses remain visible in office-visuals.
Actor click, focus panel, and direct care actions remain intact.
Relevant tests and npm run harness:gate pass.
Changelog, QA report, and handoff docs are updated.

features.name: Final character art source import
features.description: Import final AI-generated or external pixel-art character source art into the v0.52 source-normalized sheet contract and verify visual anchors in the office scene.
definition_of_done: A final or near-final source character sheet replaces the procedural v0.52 source draft without changing the 3-column, 25-row event-pose contract.
The runtime v0.52 sheet is regenerated from the final source and remains 576x4800.
Card-use, cheer, and alert poses remain readable in office-visuals.
Desktop and mobile screenshot QA confirms feet anchors, silhouette drift, and actor click targets remain stable.
Relevant tests and npm run harness:gate pass.
Changelog, QA report, and handoff docs are updated.

Asset dimensions, manifest metadata, and import scripts are covered by tests or data validation.

Changelog, QA report, and handoff docs are updated.

Runtime sheets and backdrop regenerate without changing manifest frame contracts or scenario wiring.
Desktop and mobile screenshot QA checks actor anchors, object depth ordering, backdrop framing, and HUD/text overlap.
